title: 工具执行失败: search_code
content:
[SEARCH] 搜索结果: 共找到 438 处匹配，分布在 4 个文件中

================================================================================

[FILE] architecture_summary.md (13 处匹配)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    [上下文]
       8 | - ✅ Task planning system (structured Plan management)
>>>    9 | - ✅ Three-layer memory architecture (Working / Episodic / Long-term)
      10 | - ✅ Multi-strategy context compression (LLM_SUMMARY / KEYFRAME / SLIDING_WINDOW / IMPORTANCE_FILTER)
    [上下文]
      31 | ┌───────────────┐ ┌───────────────┐ ┌───────────────┐ ┌───────────────┐
>>>   32 | │ ContextManager│ │  PlanManager  │ │  Tool System  │ │ BM25Retriever │
      33 | │  (context.py) │ │  (plan.py)    │ │ (tools/*.py)  │ │ (bm25.py)     │
    [上下文]
      32 | │ ContextManager│ │  PlanManager  │ │  Tool System  │ │ BM25Retriever │
>>>   33 | │  (context.py) │ │  (plan.py)    │ │ (tools/*.py)  │ │ (bm25.py)     │
      34 | │ Messages      │ │ Tasks & Goal  │ │ Bash · File   │ │ Keyword index │
    [上下文]
      34 | │ Messages      │ │ Tasks & Goal  │ │ Bash · File   │ │ Keyword index │
>>>   35 | │ 3-layer mem   │ │ Validation    │ │ Search · Test │ │ BM25 search   │
      36 | │ Compression   │ │ Auto-fix      │ │ Plan · Git    │ │ History inject│
    [上下文]
      48 | 
>>>   49 | ## Three-Layer Memory Architecture
      50 | 
    [上下文]
      55 | ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
>>>   56 | │  Working Memory (20 messages, FIFO eviction)         │
      57 | │  Real-time access · Latest context                   │
    [上下文]
      61 | ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
>>>   62 | │  Episodic Memory (50 summaries, importance eviction) │
      63 | │  Structured summaries · Keyword search               │
    [上下文]
      67 | ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
>>>   68 | │  Long-term Memory (unlimited, disk JSON storage)     │
      69 | │  Cross-session retrieval · Inverted index + IDF      │
    [上下文]
      69 | │  Cross-session retrieval · Inverted index + IDF      │
>>>   70 | │  Storage path: memory/long_term/*.json                │
      71 | └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
    [上下文]
      80 | | `execute_query(input)` | Main reasoning loop (max 80 steps) |
>>>   81 | | `_call_llm()` | Async LLM call + 3-layer memory injection |
      82 | | `compress_messages()` | Async context compression |
    [上下文]
      84 | 
>>>   85 | ### context.py — Context & Memory Manager
      86 | 
    [上下文]
      87 | - Message history management
>>>   88 | - Three-layer memory orchestration
      89 | - Compression engine integration
    [上下文]
     123 | 1. **Async architecture** — `async/await` + `asyncio.gather` for parallel tool execution
>>>  124 | 2. **Three-layer memory** — Working → Episodic → Long-term, with BM25 retrieval
     125 | 3. **Adaptive compression** — 4 strategies with intelligent selection + fallback

[FILE] context_compression_strategy_architecture.md (65 处匹配)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    [上下文]
       6 | > - `docs/architecture_summary.md`
>>>    7 | > - `docs/memory_system_refactor_roadmap.md`
       8 | > - `docs/new_long_term_memory_system.md`
    [上下文]
       7 | > - `docs/memory_system_refactor_roadmap.md`
>>>    8 | > - `docs/new_long_term_memory_system.md`
       9 | >
    [上下文]
       9 | >
>>>   10 | > 核心结论：下一步压缩策略不应继续停留在“按消息裁剪 + 出错后清理”的层面，而应升级为 **按 turn 原子化建模、分层压缩、结构化状态迁移、长期记忆联动、发送前协议校验** 的上下文管理系统。
      11 | 
    [上下文]
      19 | - `ContextManager` 负责消息管理、压缩触发、摘要写入；
>>>   20 | - `MemoryManager` / `MemoryItem` / `MemoryContextBuilder` 负责长期记忆、召回和 Prompt 预算注入；
      21 | - OpenAI-compatible tool pair sanitizer，用于避免 `assistant.tool_calls` 缺失对应 `tool` 响应导致 400。
    [上下文]
      33 | 
>>>   34 | 4. **长期记忆和上下文压缩边界还可以更清晰**
      35 |    压缩应负责“当前会话继续执行所需状态”；长期记忆应负责“跨会话可复用经验”。两者应协同，但不能互相替代。
    [上下文]
      34 | 4. **长期记忆和上下文压缩边界还可以更清晰**
>>>   35 |    压缩应负责“当前会话继续...
